yesterdayAnalysis: Yesterday delivered two solid recovery sessions: a 14.5mi easy bike (TSS 24, HR 110) and a 1.7mi pool swim (TSS 22, HR 109). Both stayed appropriately easy at 2 days out from Sunday's SDIT race. Combined TSS of 46 keeps you fresh while maintaining movement — exactly what's needed in race week.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's scheduled 45min bike + 15min brick run easy. Keep HR under 120 on the bike, jog the brick very easy — this is just a neuromuscular reminder, not fitness building. Final check of race-day transitions before Sunday.
weekProgress: Week 10 of 13 sits at 175 TSS of 300 target (58%) with 3 days remaining including today. This is race week tapering into Sunday's SDIT — the back-loaded structure is intentionally flipped to prioritize freshness. Friday rest and Saturday shakeout are already scheduled light, so being at this percentage is exactly on plan.
keyInsight: Sleep quality has dropped (64 avg, 2 nights below 92% SpO2) heading into race week — prioritize 8+ hours tonight and tomorrow to maximize Sunday performance.
